tasks.label: git-recovery-and-push
tasks.command: git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" rebase --abort && git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" checkout RN-Accordance && git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" remote set-url origin https://github.com/MKazmTECHNI/School-Assigments.git && git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" push -u origin RN-Accordance

tasks.label: git-inspect
tasks.command: git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" status -b --porcelain=v1; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" remote -v

tasks.label: git-abort-rebase
tasks.command: git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" rebase --abort; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" status -b --porcelain=v1

tasks.label: git-finalize-and-push
tasks.command: $repo="C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms"; $remoteUrl="https://github.com/MKazmTECHNI/School-Assigments.git"; git -C $repo rebase --abort 2>$null; git -C $repo checkout RN-Accordance; git -C $repo remote set-url origin $remoteUrl; $changes = git -C $repo status --porcelain; if ($changes) { git -C $repo add -A; git -C $repo commit -m "chore: checkpoint local changes on RN-Accordance" }; $pushOutput = git -C $repo push -u origin RN-Accordance 2>&1; $pushCode = $LASTEXITCODE; $pushOutput; if ($pushCode -ne 0 -and ($pushOutput -match "non-fast-forward|fetch first|rejected")) { git -C $repo push --force-with-lease -u origin RN-Accordance }; git -C $repo status -b --porcelain=v1; git -C $repo rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git -C $repo log -1 --pretty=format:"%H%n%s"; git -C $repo remote get-url origin

tasks.label: git-prepare-commit
tasks.command: git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" rebase --abort 2>$null; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" checkout RN-Accordance; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" remote set-url origin https://github.com/MKazmTECHNI/School-Assigments.git; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" add -A; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" commit -m "chore: checkpoint local changes on RN-Accordance"; git -C "C:/Users/eritn/AndroidStudioProjects/AgreementComms" status -b --porcelain=v1
